title: Simple gasses
description: Adds gasses and plasma to minecraft.
body:
This mod adds the 2 missing matter states in minecraft.
Gasses and Plasma(with pretty nice physics).

The mod has 6 tabs of content(and another technical one):   -   write /sg_gasses for more details
Ussual/Misc,
Poisonous/Radioactive/Corosive,
Flammable,
Explosive,
Plasma,
Items/Gear,
Obsolete/Broken/Joke

Each gas has types to it witch are specified at items description  -   Do /sg_gasses for additional details
 

Craft gear to protect you angainst new danger of poisonous gasses in the wild and use other gear to use the gasses at your advantage.

Find out what each one does in game!(we dont have a wiki and im too lazy to make one or list the gas characteristics so discover it yourself(or ask me on fourm))
